description: Phishing templates impersonating utility companies using disconnection fear and credit lures

templates.name: Power Outage Credit Notice
suggested_subject_lines: Power outage credit available on your account — claim now
Your utility credit is waiting — verify your account
Account credit notification: $45.20 applied to your balance
templates.notes: Credit/refund lure is highly effective — people don't want to miss free money. Works in areas with known utility outages.
